_note: Canned deterministic E6-T3 MARKOUT tape — stepping venue mid (bounded drift) + a guard-driven extreme abstain. Unlike the E6-T1/T2 tapes (fixed venue microstructure) each tick carries an explicit venue bid/ask so the venue mid STEPS by +0.01 (< mid_jump_threshold 0.02) across the quoting ticks — the step is what gives each resting quote leg an EVENT-TIME markout horizon (the venue's OWN next-change mid). The step is bounded (0.50 -> 0.51 -> 0.52) so the raw mid never drifts past mid_jump_threshold from the lagging smoothed mid (no spurious book_thin). FV tracks mid+0.05 through warmup + quoting (gap 0.05 == basis, residual 0 -> both arms quote two-sided, no skew), then the LAST tick keeps the venue mid STABLE at 0.52 while the FV JUMPS to 0.67 so the guarded residual (0.15 - 0.05 = 0.10) BREACHES the extreme wall (extreme_multiple*residual_band = 3.0*0.03 = 0.09): arm B fails closed to NO_QUOTE/residual_extreme (a REAL guard-driven abstention feeding the abstention metric) while the FV-blind arm A quotes. The venue book is arm-identical (both arms see the same mid); only guard_fv differs. FV and the venue mid genuinely DISAGREE (fv = mid+0.05), so scoring against the venue future mid is a real distinction from an FV-referenced (circular) score. Requires overrides ref_min_samples=2, basis_min_samples=2.
